projects.name: Prompt Vault
projects.description: VS Code extension to save, organise, and reuse prompts directly inside VS Code — with categories, favourites, template variables, version history, and import/export.
projects.summary: VS Code extension that lets developers save, organise, and reuse AI prompts without leaving the editor — with template variables, chaining, version history, and full local storage.
highlights: 53+ installs · 5-star rating on VS Code Marketplace
Template variables with {{variable}} syntax for dynamic prompts
Prompt chaining — execute multiple prompts sequentially
Fully local — no cloud sync, no tracking

projects.name: Critica
projects.description: AI-powered UI/UX design reviewer that analyses interfaces, surfaces accessibility issues, and generates actionable improvement suggestions.
projects.summary: Autonomous AI design reviewer — upload a screenshot or Figma link and get a structured critique covering layout, hierarchy, accessibility, and conversion signals.

projects.name: MinutesAI
projects.description: LLM-powered meeting transcription and structured minutes generator (LangChain, Ollama).
projects.summary: Auto-generate structured meeting minutes (agenda, decisions, action items) from raw transcripts.

projects.name: SmartMark
projects.description: Automated evaluation system for handwritten answers using CNNs and OCR pipelines.
projects.summary: Transforms unstructured handwritten answers into structured, machine-readable data using OCR + CNNs.

projects.name: FaceTrackEDU
projects.description: Face detection demo using OpenCV with Haar cascades.
projects.summary: Simple face detection demo using OpenCV Haar cascades for educational purposes.
